title: Kohtla-Järve、Ida-Viru County — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Kohtla-Järve、Ida-Viru Countyの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Kohtla-JärveはIda-Viru Countyにある人口33,000の都市です。A city in northeastern Estonia, the center of the country’s oil shale mining industry, with a predominantly Russian-speaking population and a Soviet-era urban landscape.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
